description: Writes a finished social post in THIS client's voice using Hormozi's Hook/Retain/Reward framework. The only thing that differs per client is whose voice it writes in.

swapPoints.prompt: Do you have a voice guide in your own files (a note describing how you write)? If so, what's the path to it? Leave blank if you don't have one.
If you don't have a voice file, describe your writing voice in a sentence or two (your tone, what you sound like, anything to avoid). Used as a fallback so posts still sound like you.
Your main platform for these posts (shapes the format)
